title: Super Mario Bros. 3
edition_pinned: Row describes the 1988/1990 NES design; genre evidence from archived Wii U Virtual Console product page, observed 2026-07-13.
moat: Suit power-ups rewrite movement rules while the world map prices inventory risk between stages.
scope_efficiency_hypothesis: Temporary suits and a shared map inventory multiply stage solutions without permanent skill trees.
exemplar_rationale: Shows authored platform mastery layered with optional power-up routing.

evidence.claim: Archived Nintendo Wii U Virtual Console product page listed Genre as: Action; Adventure.
evidence.platform: Nintendo Store (archived Wii U Virtual Console)
